evidence: README.md (282 lines) with work-state banner, multi-agent matrix, endpoint list, install instructions
CHANGELOG.md (201 lines) covers v0.4.0 -> Unreleased with Fixes/Features/Docs subsections

29 workflows in .github/workflows/ (ci, go-test, lint-test, codeql, sonarcloud, scorecard, license-compliance, journey-gate, policy-gate, quality-gate, security-guard, secrets-scan, trivy, zap-dast, iac-scan, fuzzing, release, etc.)
.github/dependabot.yml covers github-actions + gomod; no npm/typescript ecosystem for chat/ sub-project
.github/CODEOWNERS (paths for iac, .github, SECURITY.md, dependabot) + root CODEOWNERS alias
CONTRIBUTING.md exists but is only 8 lines, points to CLAUDE.md for branch-based protocol (thin)
SECURITY.md (30 lines) with reporting flow, supported-versions, 48h ack, 90d disclosure

candidates.use_case: Replace ad-hoc internal eventing (lib/httpapi EventEmitter + internal/routing) with canonical bus for agent lifecycle events across 11 CLI harnesses
Promote per-request id (already in lib/logctx) to canonical request_id propagation that also crosses SSE stream boundaries and chat (Next.js) SSR fetch boundary
Consolidate the Go SDK (sdk/openapi_agent_client_v1) and the bundled coder/agentapi-sdk-go dependency under one local Go SDK monorepo
Unify harness registry (internal/harness: claude_harness, codex_harness, generic_harness, base, parse) and routing registry (internal/routing/agent_bifrost) under a canonical registry contract
Wire the chat (Next.js 15) frontend to the shared auth SDK; today the chat has zero auth, talks to /v1/chat/completions unauthenticated
Add Python helpers around the auto-generated sdk/python/agentapi/api.py (today only 2 .py files, no test/typing extras)
Express the per-agent harness configuration (claude, codex, goose, aider, gemini, copilot, amp, auggie, cursor, amazonq, opencode) as phenotype skills instead of hard-coded Go maps in lib/msgfmt
Replace slog-only observability with PhenoObservability (OTel + Prometheus) -- currently zero OTel, zero Prometheus imports
Centralize .golangci.yml + .pre-commit-config.yaml + dependabot.yml + go.mod constraint policy into a shared dep-guard config
Wire the existing e2e/ subtests (which are flaky per the work-state banner) to the phenotype-journeys framework

sota_gaps: No OpenTelemetry: zero `go.opentelemetry.io/*` imports; observability is slog-only (cmd/server + lib/httpapi use log/slog, no tracer propagation)
No Prometheus metrics endpoint: no /metrics, no promhttp, no expvar -- cannot alert on agent latency/error rate
No pprof endpoint: net/http/pprof not imported; on-call debugging requires live process attach
No rate limiting middleware on the httpapi server (chi middleware chain is Recoverer + Logger only)
No retry/backoff middleware for the agent harness PTY spawn (screentracker is the only abstraction over it)
SSOT.md exists (33 lines) but Architecture block is largely placeholders ("Hexagonal: in progress", Ports/Adapters/Domain: N/A) -- no real SSOT-driven design
internal/phenotype/init.go is a stub -- it only `MkdirAll` a `.phenotype` directory; the comment promises CGo bindings to pheno-ffi-go that are never linked in (go.mod has no CGo tags)
Chat (Next.js) has no authentication and no SSR request-id propagation; calls /v1/chat/completions directly
SSE stream (lib/httpapi/events.go) does not propagate request_id; client-side reconnect cannot correlate with server logs
Chat lacks i18n (no next-intl, no message catalog) -- only English copy
Chat is not deployed via the new docs-site VitePress pipeline (chat/ has its own gh-pages script, separate from docs/)
Tests are flaky per README work-state banner ("huma/chat-embed CI + flaky e2e") -- no quarantine mechanism
e2e binary build coordination is a recent fix (commit 15053c1) -- race-prone by design (per-process sync.Once + atomic rename)
Dual LICENSE files: LICENSE (MIT) + LICENSE-MIT + LICENSE-APACHE -- three license files for a project that until commit a8363fb had only one LICENSE
Branch is 9 ahead / 4 behind origin; no rebase-with-upstream workflow in CONTRIBUTING.md
OpenAPI schema is generated at build time (main.go: //go:generate) but openapi.json is checked in (33KB) and not regenerated in CI
No structured trace IDs in the agent handler logs (agent_handler.go uses plain slog without request context propagation from chi)
Coverage.out is checked into the repo (110KB) -- should be gitignored
No Dockerfile / OCI image for the server binary (only an install-from-curl-binary flow in README)
No Helm chart / k8s manifest for deployment (no /deploy or /charts directory)
convergence_rationale: Primary Go HTTP service (72 .go files, chi + huma + cobra + slog) + Next.js 15/React 19 chat UI (30 .ts/.tsx) + auto-generated Python SDK (2 .py) + 11-agent CLI harness layer (internal/harness/*) + OpenAPI schema with generated clients. Spans 3 source languages plus generated client code; not a pure web stack (server is the product) and not pure convergence yet (SSOT is placeholders).

action_items.title: Wire OpenTelemetry SDK + Prometheus exporter into lib/httpapi and cmd/server
action_items.details: Add go.opentelemetry.io/otel + otelhttp + otlp/grpc exporters, wrap chi with otelhttp.Middleware, expose /metrics (promhttp) and /debug/pprof. Replace slog-only observability. Closes the largest SOTA gap and unblocks downstream alerting.

action_items.title: Adopt phenotype-request-id for end-to-end correlation across SSE streams and chat SSR
action_items.details: lib/logctx already has WithRequestID/RequestID; swap chi.RequestID for phenotype-request-id middleware, propagate id into the SSE event emitter (lib/httpapi/events.go) and into Next.js server-side fetch via x-request-id header on the chat -> /v1/chat/completions path.

action_items.title: Migrate chat (Next.js) to phenotype-auth-ts and add SSR request-id propagation
action_items.details: Today the chat UI calls /v1/chat/completions unauthenticated and has no SSR-side request id. Wire phenotype-auth-ts, add a server-side wrapper that injects x-request-id from a per-request id, and gate the chat behind a session cookie.

action_items.title: Replace ad-hoc internal eventing with phenotype-bus for the 11 agent lifecycle events
action_items.details: Refactor lib/httpapi EventEmitter and internal/routing/agent_bifrost to publish agent.started / message.sent / message.delta / agent.idle / agent.errored onto phenotype-bus. Allows other services to subscribe without coupling to the chi router.

action_items.title: Fill in the SSOT.md architecture block and convert the phenotype.Init stub into a real wiring
action_items.details: SSOT.md is mostly placeholders. Either complete the Hexagonal section (define ports/adapters/domain) or downgrade the doc to a state snapshot. Wire internal/phenotype/init.go to the real phenotype-config SDK path, or delete the CGo comment in the package doc since the CGo library is never linked.

notes: Upstream is coder/agentapi; HEAD is 3b413fee with 9 local / 4 remote divergent commits. Seven fixes are 'staged for upstream' per README line 6.
AGENTS.md is project-level (8 lines, points to AgilePlus) and diverges from the deeper AGENTS.md convention used in other Phenotype repos.
chat/ is a standalone Next.js app (its own package.json, eslint config, .storybook) with no link from the Go module -- verify it builds in CI via the lint-test workflow.
Coverage artifact (coverage.out, 110KB) is tracked in git; recommend gitignore.
openapi.json is regenerated locally via `go generate` but not in CI; risk of doc drift.
SSOT.md was added in commit 6d5e705 ('docs: add SSOT.md') -- recent and intentionally minimal; not yet a real SSOT.
internal/phenotype/init.go's doc references a 'phenoconfig' CGo package that is not present in go.mod -- the package comment is aspirational and should either be wired or removed.
Recent focus areas per CHANGELOG: per-request-id structured logging (commit 4898161) and e2e race fixes (15053c1, a7f6394) -- observability maturity is rising but still pre-OTel.
